name: Cappucino Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Mix and press into bottom and sides of 10-inch springform pan.
12 oz CREAM CHEESE, unwrapped and warmed in Microwave 2-1/2 minutes
6 JUMBO EGGS, out of shells and warmed in Microwave for 30 seconds
recipeInstructions:
CRUST
1. Mix all crust ingredients together.
2. Press mixture into the bottom and sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
CAKE
1. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Add sugar and beat again.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in sour cream, heavy cream, cornstarch, cinnamon, nutmeg, and boiling water.
4. Pour batter into prepared crust.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until center is almost set.
6. Remove from oven and let cool to room temperature.
7. Cool completely before refrigerating.
